name: license-attribution sweep validates that a paywalled compliance attestation has its license recorded
command:
mkdir -p compliance/attestations && printf 'framework: pci-dss-v4
attested_by: vendor
license: proprietary
' > compliance/attestations/pci-dss-v4.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/license-attribution.sh" --check-attestations 2>out.txt && grep -q 'attestation=pci-dss-v4 license=proprietary valid=true' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
